recentItems.title: Demand for cruises appears undimmed despite hantavirus and other onboard outbreaks - Boston Herald
recentItems.summary: Despite a 2026 hantavirus outbreak aboard the MV Hondius, which sickened 23 passengers and crew and led to 4 deaths, with 87 people quarantined in Greenland, the cruise industry reports that consumer demand remains strong, with a Cruise Lines International Association spokesperson stating, "Travelers continue to book voyages at record levels."

recentItems.title: Licensable picture: The cruise ship MV Hondius, which was affected by a hantavirus outbreak, arrives for disinfection at the Port of Rotterdam - Reuters Connect
recentItems.summary: The cruise ship MV Hondius arrived at the Port of Rotterdam for disinfection after a hantavirus outbreak; Dutch health officials reported that 6 passengers and 4 crew members were infected, with 1 death, while over 200 others were quarantined aboard, though not all showed symptoms.
